overall.description: First-person perspective of a player interacting with a surveillance terminal in a sci-fi industrial setting. The player watches a live feed of a crew member in a green uniform moving through a narrow, dimly lit corridor with green emergency lighting.

events.description: player switches terminal interface from message view to fullscreen surveillance video

agents.ego_description: standing at a terminal, browsing the message interface before switching to fullscreen video

notable_agents.action: crew member visible in small video preview window, facing the surveillance camera

entered.detail: futuristic terminal screen displaying surveillance feeds and message interface
text list panel showing message headers and navigation options
small video window showing the surveillance feed of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player views a security terminal interface with a message list on the left and a small surveillance video preview in the center. The terminal displays a live feed of a crew member in a green uniform standing in a narrow corridor. At the end of the segment, the player switches to fullscreen video mode.

events.description: crew member on surveillance feed turns and walks away down the corridor
crew member stops at the end of corridor and turns back toward the camera
crew member gestures with hands while looking at the surveillance camera

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the surveillance feed, watching the crew member's movements through the corridor

notable_agents.action: crew member moving through corridor, initially facing camera, then walking away, returning, and gesturing

entered.detail: green-lit metal walls of the industrial corridor now visible in enlarged feed
doorway at the end of the corridor visible in the surveillance feed

segments.scene_description: The surveillance feed now fills the screen, showing a narrow industrial corridor with green emergency lighting. The crew member walks away from the camera down the corridor, stops at a doorway, then returns while gesturing and appearing to communicate through the camera. The player remains stationary, monitoring the feed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from a fragmented security interface into a full-screen surveillance feed of a dimly lit industrial corridor. It begins with a view of a terminal displaying a message list and a small video preview of a crew member in a green uniform. As the player interacts with the system, the interface shifts and expands, causing the surveillance feed to suddenly fill the entire screen. The scene then opens up to reveal the narrow corridor bathed in green emergency lighting, where the crew member walks away toward a doorway before turning back to gesture toward the camera.
